summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Heirloom
film.announcement: Annecy winner closes French co-production with Condor Films and lands CNC grant.

film.title: Sheep in the Box
film.announcement: Neon drops first trailer for Hirokazu Koreeda's AI family drama.

tv.title: Shifters
tv.announcement: Channel 4 and See-Saw Films developing TV adaptation of Benedict Lombe's play, which is transferring to A24's Cherry Lane Theatre.

tv.title: Prudence
tv.announcement: OuiDo launches adult animation company with horror series Prudence in partnership with Mars Express producers.

tv.title: Gunshot
tv.talent: Kent Tsai, Chan Tzu-Hsuan, Mark Lee (cast)
tv.announcement: Police drama starts production for Taiwan's PTS Taigi with Kent Tsai, Chan Tzu-Hsuan, and Mark Lee heading the cast.
